endpoints.name: Copyrights whole world
endpoints.description:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for the whole world.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber.

endpoints.name: Captions
endpoints.description: This API returns copyright captions for the map service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber.

endpoints.name: Copyrights bounding box
endpoints.description:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for a specific bounding box.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{MINLAT}} with a real minlat. Replace {{MINLON}} with a real minlon. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{MAXLON}} with a real maxlon. Replace {{MAXLAT}} with a real maxlat.

endpoints.name: Copyrights tile
endpoints.description:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for the a specific map tile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{ZOOM}} with a real zoom. Replace {{Y}} with a real y. Replace {{X}} with a real x.

endpoints.name: Static Image
endpoints.description:
The Static Image service renders a rectangular raster image
in the style, size, and zoom level specified. The image can be requested
using either a center point plus width and height or a bounding box.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber.

endpoints.name: Tile
endpoints.description: The Maps API Vector Service delivers vector tiles, which are representations of square sections of map data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{STYLE}} with a real style. Replace {{LAYER}} with a real layer. Replace {{ZOOM}} with a real zoom. Replace {{Y}} with a real y. Replace {{X}} with a real x.

endpoints.name: Tile
endpoints.description: The Maps API Raster Service delivers raster tiles, which are representations of square sections of map data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{STYLE}} with a real style. Replace {{LAYER}} with a real layer. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{ZOOM}} with a real zoom. Replace {{Y}} with a real y. Replace {{X}} with a real x.

endpoints.name: GetMap
endpoints.description:
The GetMap call implements the Web Map Service 1.1.1 standard
to access TomTom raster map tiles. This service is described
in the response to the GetCapabilities API call.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber.

endpoints.name: GetCapabilities
endpoints.description:
The GetCapabilities call is part of TomTom's implementation of version 1.1.1
the Web Map Service (WMS). It provides descriptions of the other calls
that are available in the implementation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber.

endpoints.name: WMTS
endpoints.description: The WMTS GetCapabilities call implements version 1.0.0 of the Web Map Tile Service (WMTS) standard. It returns metadata that allows compatible calling systems to construct calls to TomTom's raster map tile service. See the documentation for more information on WMTS.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TOMTOM_API_KEY}} with your TOMTOM API KEY. Replace {{WMTSVERSION}} with a real wmtsversion. Replace {{VERSIONNUMBER}} with a real versionnumber. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.
